zh.lifeSummary: Osbert de Mundeford III是John Monford de Mundeford的兒子，於1345年出生在英國諾福爾可霍可沃爾德。他於大約1380年與Elizabeth結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1396年8月在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍可沃爾德享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金斯 琳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Osbert de Mundeford III是John Monford de Mundeford的儿子，于1345年出生在英国諾福爾可霍可沃爾德。他于大约1380年与Elizabeth结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1396年8月在英国英格兰諾福爾可霍可沃爾德享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可金斯 琳。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mundeford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Munford
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name from Mundford in Norfolk, so named from the Old English personal name Munda + Old English ford ‘ford’.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mountford  .

variants.name: Mountford
meanings: English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montfort-sur-Risle (Eure) or from one or other of various places called Montfort in France (from Old French mont ‘hill’ + fort ‘fortress’). Early forms of this name are indistinguishable from those of Mundford in Norfolk, perhaps indicating an alternative habitational name (see Munford ).

History: A Norman bearer of this name, from Montfort-sur-Risle in Eure, near Brionne, accompanied William the Conqueror in his invasion of England in 1066. Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester, led a rebellion against Henry III (1216–1272).

nameMeanings.name: Osbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ōs ‘god’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. It is not now common, but in the earlier 20th century it enjoyed a modest vogue in Britain, being borne for example by the cartoonist Osbert Lancaster ( 1908–86 ) and the writer Osbert Sitwell ( 1892–1969 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Osbert de Mundeford III was born in 1345, in Hockwold, Norfolk, England as the son of John Monford de Mundeford. He married Elizabeth about 1380. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about August 1396, in Hockwold, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Kings Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Osbert de Mundeford III est né en 1345, à Hockwold, Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de John Monford de Mundeford. Il a épousé Elizabeth environ 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ août 1396, à Hockwold, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Kings Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er starb um August 1396 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Hockwold, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kings Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Morì circa agosto 1396, nel Hockwold, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Kings Lynn, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Hockwold, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクホーックウオルド
ja.lifeSummary: Osbert de Mundeford IIIは1345年にイギリスノーフォルクホーックウオルドでJohn Monford de Mundefordの息子として生まれた。約1380年にElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1396年8月にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホーックウオルドで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクキングズ リンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Osbert de Mundeford III(은)는 1345년 영국 노르폴크 호ck울드에서 John Monford de Mundeford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1380년 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1396년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 호ck울드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그스 린에 묻혔다.

Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente agosto de 1396, em Hockwold, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Kings Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Osbert de Mundeford III родился в 1345 г. в местности хоккволд, норфолк, Англия. Его отца звали John Monford de Mundeford. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth около 1380 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около август 1396 г. в местности хоккволд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности кингс линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
